_meta.note: Weight vectors for the alternative-composite specifications (methodology s4): any positive scale, normalized to sum 1 at compute time. These exist to show conclusions are not weighting-dependent, so defensibility matters more than decimal precision. trade_exposure: rough shares of India's goods+services trade associated with each channel's counterpart region (Ministry of Commerce FY2024-25 orders of magnitude: China ~11% goods, US ~11% goods plus the largest services share, GCC ~15%, Pakistan <0.5%); shipping is a conduit, not a counterpart, and gets a residual. import_exposure: import-dependency emphasis (Gulf crude+LNG dominate the import bill; China is the largest goods-import source; shipping weighted as the sea-borne conduit for ~95% of trade volume). Round numbers by design.
